Yu Xuan's aunt Mei Ru agrees to help her online lover transfer a parcel. Turns out the parcel contains drugs, and she is arrested for suspected drug dealing. Yu Xuan seeks Guo Ying's help in tracking down the drug trafficking organisation.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 4
programme.desc: While investigating a case, Ying Jie finds the passport of Yu Wen Guang, who should have been dead for years. Yu Wen Guang was the informant of Ying Jie's mother, Tang Mei Xiu. She was killed while having a rendezvous with him for a drug-dealing case. Guo Ying, Yu Xuan and Zhi Ming investigates the bungalow where his bones were discovered, and finds another set of bones!

programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mba Pembersih Berkilau Aku Nyangkut Di Hatimu
programme.desc: Diva (Ika Diharjo) accidentally saw Andre (Christ Laurent) being hypnotized on the street, Diva and her mother finally brought Andre to her house even though the cat is kucingan with Mr. RT. It has been going on for several hours that the hypnosis does not disappear and makes Andre realize who he really is. Diva and her mother are getting dizzy, so they agree to give Andre the pseudonym Cecep.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 138
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Dangdut Kelaz Aku Kamu Paling Pas
programme.desc: Topan (Indra Brotolaras) goes to the village to look for his biological mother with a photo provided by his father. Topan then searches for a dangdut studio, which turns out to have a vocalist named Novia (Nabila Zavira). Novia initially rejects Topan's presence, thinking that city boys don't like dangdut music. But all of that was disproved by Topan's earnestness when learning dangdut music.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 592
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 58
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: NUMPANG CURCOL JADI CINTA
programme.desc: Nanang met Dhea and they got into an argument. Nanang liked Dhea at first sight. But Ghea felt repulsed by him. Nanang was from Brebes and was naive and innocent, while Dhea was a trendy city girl. Ghea found a boarding house for Nanang, and they ended up living in the same neighborhood. As time goes on... Nanang always listens to Dhea's complaints about her life and her crush. Does Dhea realize that Nanang has feelings for her?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 138
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Miss Biduan I Love You Sekebon
programme.desc: Adrian (Elryan Carlen) is upset with Tifa (Ina Marika) for refusing to evict her house. Because of this, Tifa has to lose her job. Fortunately, Tifa meets a grandmother who offers her a job after helping her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 592
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih always knew how to handle the horses at Burhan's ranch, Sandra's father. Bimo came to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which was riding and caring for horses. As soon as he got on the horse, Bimo fell off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated. Since Burhan noticed that Bimo and Asih knew each other, he asked Asih to train Bimo in horseback riding.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 59

programme.title: Utamakan Keselamatan Jangan Mantan

programme.desc: Acan accidentally damaged Ajeng's bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. programme.title: Attack - Part 1
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and distraught with the thoughts of his dead lover. So, when the attacker returns, Arjun participates in an experiment to seek revenge.

programme.title: Taal
programme.desc: Humiliated by her ex's family, Mansi rebuilds her life with Vikrant's help, but when her former lover returns seeking forgiveness, old pain threatens her new success. Release Year: 1999 Director: Subhash Ghai

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Super Singh
programme.desc: A simple man gains mysterious superpowers and begins a life changing journey where love, courage, sacrifice, and self belief teach him his true purpose in the world.

programme.title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
programme.desc: Raj and Priya hire Madhubala as a surrogate, but when she falls for Raj and wants the baby, emotions explode, testing trust, love, and the future of their marriage. programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 5
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 25
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 26
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 27
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 8
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 18
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 4
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Football - Ligue 1 Mcdonald's
programme.desc: A match from the French football championship.

programme.title: Football - Ligue 1 Mcdonald's
programme.desc: A match from the French football championship.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Basik
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 14
programme.desc: Former professional wrestler, Rakesh Jain arrives in France with a special sports visa. Seduced by Paris and French culture, he quickly learns the language and becomes a yoga trainer in prestigious centers. An opportunity to illustrate the inspiring fusion of French and Indian cultures.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone - EP 22
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Top 14 Rugby Le Mag - EP 19
programme.desc: Presenting the day's action in the Top 14, the French rugby championship, with summaries and highlights from the matches, players interviews and comments.

programme.title: Carbone - EP 10
programme.desc: Pierre Chastenay, Yanick Villedieu and Christian Messier are three scientists who share the same springtime passion: producing artisanal maple syrup.

programme.title: #Investigation
programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Research, evidence, personal stories and confrontations are at the heart of the film reports about a range of subjects mainly relating to Belgian society. The key words? Independence and transparency!

programme.title: Parler Mal
programme.desc: Could it be that two Acadian actors in the successful series ''a la valdrague'' suffer from linguistic insecurity? Bianca Richard and Gabriel Robichaud, from New Brunswick, set themselves the challenge of deciphering this curse and examine the state of expression of the French-Canadian language and particularly Acadian.

programme.title: Le Mot Je T'aime N'existe Pas
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Republic and the tumult of different dialects, Nadesh, Cherif and Anamiga are amongst the countless interpreters working daily to recount stories of exile and precarity. Their voices weave an invisible thread between here and elsewhere, the world of the living and the darkness of migration.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 10
programme.desc: 'Painting is first and foremost a place of work.'' A painter of abstraction, Anne Slacik has spent twenty-five years developing her work, always closely connected to contemporary poetry. Encounter...

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 12

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 24
programme.desc: In Wingen-sur-Moder, the Musee Lalique presents the abundant work of Rene Lalique and his successors. Olivier Polge is the perfumer for Chanel. For Vuitton, Pharrell Williams breaks down the boundaries between music, fashion and art. Aurore Mazeres carries on the skills of five generations of upholsterers who preceded her.

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: Littoral, a program meant for those who love the sea, takes you on a trip along Atlantic coastlines, wherever unexpected discoveries, impromptu encounters and intense emotions lead them.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week! Resolutely in tune with the times, the first morning of France, strong of its editorial richness and its team dynamics, addresses many themes and deals with current events with seriousness and without dramatization.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: Chef Pays - EP 22
programme.desc: Chef Louise Denisot prepares carrot and cumin patties with feta.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 7
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde dives into Bordeaux elegance and discovers Gers authenticity.

programme.title: Littoral - EP 20
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 28
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 39
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Le Petit Geek - EP 26
programme.desc: What exactly does an influencer do? How do you create a video game? Why are screens dangerous, and what about digital identities? In each episode children shed light on today's virtual world.

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 17
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 7
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 8

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 16

Hundreds of gendarmes are mobilized to find him. The investigation will lead them to a dangerous repeat offender, a particularly disturbing predator.

programme.title: Meurtres En Champagne
programme.desc: When Madame Dupaquier is found murdered in her own champagne cellars, Inspector Guerini and Constable Delorme head the investigation. Given the labyrinth of tunnels connecting the cellars and the cryptic inscription left by the murderer, they call on Bastien Keller for help. Unfortunately the specialist geologist is currently serving time!

programme.title: Movie - Kaalai
programme.desc: A man comes to the city, seeking revenge from another man for killing his grandmother. He begins to woo the man's daughter and when the time is right, abducts her and holds her hostage.

programme.title: Movie - Aazhvaar
programme.desc: Aalwar, a young man, loves his mother and sister dearly but fails to protect them from his foes. However, he turns into a ruthless killer, dressing up as Hindu gods, to avenge their murder.

programme.title: Movie - M.Kumaran Son Of Mahalakshmi
programme.desc: Besides his girlfriend, Kumaran is very passionate about kick-boxing. His life is shattered when his dying mother asks him to meet his estranged father in Malaysia.

programme.desc: When a few children go to play at an abandoned mansion, they are soon joined by adults with evil intentions. However, a mother-daughter duo of ghosts won't let anybody out of the house.

programme.desc: When Thulasi Raman, a teacher, is falsely accused of killing a man, his son Sethu, a librarian, sets out to find the real culprit.

programme.title: Movie - Manam Kothi Paravaigal
programme.desc: The son of a construction business owner falls in love with his neighbour's daughter. His life gets into danger when he learns that her father is a criminal.

programme.title: Movie - Andipatti Arasampatti
programme.desc: A visually-challenged man and a hearing-impaired man become friends. Soon they get involved in a smuggling operation where they are chased by both cops and the smugglers who believe that they have their loot.

programme.desc: Orey Thai Orey Kulam movie is a Tamil feature film starring Nizhakgal Ravi.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: PL RIVALRIES - EP 1
programme.desc: Rivalries don't get much bigger than Sunderland v Newcastle. With the Wear-Tyne derby around the corner, Sunderland legend Kevin Phillips and former Newcastle goalkeeper Shay Given sit down to discuss why this game matters so much and to talk through their top ten moments from the derby over the years.

programme.title: PREMIER LEAGUE LIVE (Live)
programme.desc: The super Sunday begins with the Tyne-Wear Derby as Newcastle host rivals Sunderland at St. James' Park. Then struggling Spurs take on Nott'm Forest in a huge relegation clash at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: REVIEW - SUN 22 MAR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 31. Friday night kicks off the weekend as Bournemouth host Man United, while Liverpool travel to Brighton, and Tottenham close out the weekend's fixtures against Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: FANZONE - MON 23 MAR (Live)

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW31 Tottenham Hotspur v Nottingham Forest
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: Brentford vs Wolverhampton Wanderers (MW30) - EP 300
programme.desc: Wolves have won their last two Premier League games, having only won one of their previous 32 (D8 L23).

programme.title: The Art Of... 2025/26 - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: Bournemouth vs Manchester United (MW31) - EP 302
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United (W2 D3), scoring more goals in these five (13) than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division (10).

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Arsenal (MW31) - EP 301
programme.desc: Since doing the double over Arsenal in 2020-21, Wolves have now lost each of their last nine against the Gunners in the Premier League.

programme.title: Fulham vs Burnley (MW31) - EP 304
programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their last 21 Premier League games (D7 L13), though four of their 10 points in this run have come away against London sides (3-2 vs Crystal Palace, 1-1 vs Chelsea).

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Liverpool (MW31) - EP 303
programme.desc: After a run of just one win in 13 Premier League games from the start of December (D6 L6), Brighton have now won three of their last four (L1).

programme.title: Everton vs Chelsea (MW31) - EP 305
programme.desc: Everton have lost just one of their last eight Premier League home games against Chelsea (W5 D2), going down 1-0 in August 2022.

programme.title: The Saturday Wrap 2025/26 - EP 26
programme.desc: A complete review of all the day’s Premier League football, with highlights and studio discussion. The Saturday Wrap broadcasts immediately after Premier League Live on Saturday.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Brentford (MW31) - EP 306
programme.desc: Leeds are winless in their last five Premier League games (D3 L2), failing to score in each of their last three. They last had a longer run without a goal in February/March 2022 (4 games).

programme.title: Fulham vs Burnley (MW31) - EP 304
programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their last 21 Premier League games (D7 L13), though four of their 10 points in this run have come away against London sides (3-2 vs Crystal Palace, 1-1 vs Chelsea).

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Liverpool (MW31) - EP 303
programme.desc: After a run of just one win in 13 Premier League games from the start of December (D6 L6), Brighton have now won three of their last four (L1).

programme.title: The Saturday Wrap 2025/26 - EP 26
programme.desc: A complete review of all the day’s Premier League football, with highlights and studio discussion. The Saturday Wrap broadcasts immediately after Premier League Live on Saturday.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Sunderland (MW31) (Live) - EP 307
programme.desc: Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle (W7 D3), winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture (Newcastle also 10 between 1985 and 1997).

programme.title: Aston Villa vs West Ham United (MW31) (Live) - EP 308
programme.desc: West Ham are winless in their last six Premier League games against Aston Villa, alternating between a draw (3) and defeat (3) each time.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is ‘Head of Football Operations’. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats’ remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Darren Daniel vs. Dricus Du Plessis
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts in South Africa including two Middleweights Darren "Double D" Daniel and Dricus "Stillknocks" Du Plessis who will meet in the hex for middleweight supremacy. Bonus coverage includes Alain Ilunga vs. Sydney Mokgolo and Themba Gorimbo vs. Alex Cheboub.

programme.title: WCCB Tim Tszyu vs. Sebastian Fundora
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, undefeated Super Welterweight World Champion Tim Tszyu travels from Australia to defend his title against former World Champion Sebastian Fundora. Fundora stands 6'5", and is known for his all-action and exciting style. He replaces an injured Keith Thurman, and jumps into a World Title match-up against one of boxing's rising stars in Tszyu.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 5: Marseille, France - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Savate and the Martial Art of Hands and Feet with Masters Christian Robert, Frank May, Frederic Baret, Laurent Bois and Patrick Gellat.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Sergio Mora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing off with Sergio Mora with a highly disputed and controversial decision you will have to see to believe! The two never had a rematch. Also on the card, action from WBC Super Welterweight champ Jermell Charlo.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Kakuryu, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Koteoko from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Canelo Alvarez vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: This episode features then-WBC silver light middleweight champion Saul (Canelo) Alvarez looking to give Carlos Baldomir his first career KO loss, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. Also, we catch up with Clay Guida and Urijah Faber at the LA Fit Expo and we go behind the scenes for an intimate photo shoot with beautiful ring girl Amber Nicole.

programme.title: WCCB Rolando Romero vs. Anthony Yigit
programme.desc: Rolly takes on Anthony Yigit of Sweden at the AT&T Center in San Antonio on the undercard of the Jermell Charlo/Brian Castano contest. Rolly comes into this bout with an undefeated 13-0 record, while Yigit is 24-1-1, having won three straight bouts after his first career loss to Ivan Baranchyk. Watch Rolly Romero vs. Anthony Yigit, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Hector Camacho vs. Tony Menefee
programme.desc: Hector "Macho" Camacho, always entertaining and flamboyant, stepping into the ring with 62-4 Tony Menefee in Lincoln, Nebraska. Camacho was on the comeback trail, following an up and down year that saw him defeat the legendary Sugar Ray Leonard by TKO before dropping a unanimous decision to Oscar De La Hoya for the WBC Welterweight Title. With his eyes on another title shot he faces Menefee, in the midst of a 14-fight win streak.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Canelo Alvarez vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Canelo Alvarez taking on Kermit Cintron in a bout that helped elevate Alvarez into the light middleweight title picture and take another step towards becoming one of the biggest names in boxing. Also on the card, action from a classic battle between Joel Casamayor and Michael Katsidis for the WBO Lightweight title.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Mitakeumi, Ryuden, Kotoshogiku and Takarafuji from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds conclude at the Port of Los Angeles in San Pedro, Cal., before the historic battleship USS Iowa, where a very special all active duty and retired military members tackle such obstacles as the Log Runner and I Beam Cross.

programme.title: FS MMA Micahel Patt vs. Kaream Ellington
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Michael Patt takes time away from studying for his MBA to take on a dangerous wrestler and Muay Thai practicioner Kaream Ellington in Costa Rica.

programme.title: WCCB Rolando Romero vs. Anthony Yigit
programme.desc: Rolly takes on Anthony Yigit of Sweden at the AT&T Center in San Antonio on the undercard of the Jermell Charlo/Brian Castano contest. Rolly comes into this bout with an undefeated 13-0 record, while Yigit is 24-1-1, having won three straight bouts after his first career loss to Ivan Baranchyk. Watch Rolly Romero vs. Anthony Yigit, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Hector Camacho vs. Tony Menefee
programme.desc: Hector "Macho" Camacho, always entertaining and flamboyant, stepping into the ring with 62-4 Tony Menefee in Lincoln, Nebraska. Camacho was on the comeback trail, following an up and down year that saw him defeat the legendary Sugar Ray Leonard by TKO before dropping a unanimous decision to Oscar De La Hoya for the WBC Welterweight Title. With his eyes on another title shot he faces Menefee, in the midst of a 14-fight win streak.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Canelo Alvarez vs. Kermit Cintron

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: A giant grimbot bounces down the valley of Machu Picchu. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Larry is cooking steamed tofu, egg and prawn. China is famous for its wonderful food so Larry's friends are very excited to come over for his Chinese themed meal.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: In this episode, Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the Danube river in Vienna, Austria on a baby animal mission to help a newly hatched European pond turtle reach water. Along the way, the intrepid team witness the emergence of ten million mayflies.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S8) - EP 25
programme.desc: Squawk takes us on a journey to find Sandy and Seaweed's top Swashbuckle moments.

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: He-He Krash and Amelia play. Amelia tells everyone that her flight is the most interesting

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in "Dance Mode" as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: During the Veggies' Super Sidekick Costume Contest, Evil Pea traps Supertato in a jar of honey. All is lost until the Veggies become real super sidekicks, the Tato Team!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 20
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 84
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing about silly things that make them smile.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: As everyone else gets their films ready for a big movie night, Zip still doesn't know what his film should be about. He wonders whether he will have a film to show at movie night after all.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: Dog and Pug have a power cut in the bookshop. They want to know what it was like before electricity and they go to an old lighthouse. The light is about to go out before the keeper can return.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy finds a very dusty sock underneath his bed, but why does it make him teary? He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but is disheartened to learn that it will take a long time to bloom. Cynthia and Gran Gran show JoJo how to take care of it and the best way to measure its growth.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: When JoJo can't find her favourite Captain Chloe storybook, Gran Gran suggests they make up their own story.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah & Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 20
programme.desc: Thomas is asked to help at the animal park for the day and realizes that it also involves being decorated as a monkey.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.desc: Evil Pea freezes the veggies so she can take over the whole supermarket. Chilli's heat unfreezes Supertato who then races on lolly-stick skis to thwart Evil Pea and save the day.

Meanwhile, Tina is trapped at home with her paranoid grandma Yaya, forced to prove to her that she’s not a criminal baby like the news is causing Yaya to believe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 78
programme.desc: The Templeton’s hometown is overtaken by baby criminals, with Temp Baby Aubrey in charge. Boss has 48 hours to somehow restore them all to adulthood and turn them in, or face jail time himself. With Tina now acting like a dark angel of vengeance after feeling betrayed by Aubrey, Boss is forced to assemble a team from unlikely odd friends. Together, they launch a final mission to settle old scores and clear Boss Baby’s name.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender S1 - EP 1

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 39
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Aardvark didn't have a sticky tongue. He had a long nose, big clumsy paws and he found it very difficult to eat. Then one day Aardvark's tongue got stuck in the honey log! All his friends pulled and pulled until KERPLING! Aardvark's tongue finally came unstuck. From that day on Aardvark's tongue was all long and sticky - perfect for eating yummy termites. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 40
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Whale didn't spout. Then one day there is a big storm in Tinga Tinga. The winds blew stronger and the ocean waves got bigger and bigger. Suddenly an enormous wave picks up Whale and carries her all the way from the ocean to the Waterhole. SPLOSH! But Whale was so full of water that she couldn't move! How do the animals help Whale get back to the ocean? For once, Elephant has the answer. Tales from Africa.

But to pull this off, he'll need to win over Tim's family into letting him stay, and convince Baby Corp to give him back his old job... which is currently held by his baby niece Tina.

programme.desc: Tina and Boss adjust to co-boss responsibilities while on a mission to rescue the baby with the best hair in the world from a lice outbreak. With opposing leadership views, the two split the existing field team's focus and discover a new archenemy in Lumpy the Park Duck.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 41
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Parrot was the best keeper of secrets in the whole of Tinga Tinga. Infact Parrot couldn't open his beak at all! Then one day some beast dares to steal Lion's mane and Parrot sees the whole thing! But how is going to tell Lion?! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 42
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bushbaby didn't have big eyes. She had tiny little eyes and she was always getting lost. Strange things begin to happen and there are stories that Majitu the Great Giant has returned to Tinga Tinga. Young Bushbaby doesn't believe a word of it... and convinces the other animals that Majitu the Giant does not exist. "If you can't see him, he's not real". But then she does see the Giant and her eyes grow big as planets. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Marcus brings home the class tree sapling for the weekend, the Dew Drops see it starting to wilt and must cheer the sapling up, so Marcus can make sure to plant it for his class. / When Athena accidentally breaks Lola's nature sculpture, the Dew Drops must go on a scavenger hunt to replace the missing pieces.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: The Community Center's Lost and Found is full and it's up to the gang to use their detective skills and return the lost items to their original owners. / Rodney only needs one more bird on his birdwatching list, but the only problem is that it only comes out at night! Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.desc: There have been many sacred relics believed to be imbued with mystical powers. Is it possible that these ordinary items, like a tooth, or a soldier's spear, can have the ability to perform miracles?

programme.title: The Pickers (S18) - EP 328
programme.desc: Mike visits the Virginia birthplace of a high-speed camera that changed the world. Meanwhile in Nashville, a music guru has some sobering news about Danielle's rock'n'roll gamble.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: From pedal cars to Power Wheels, we're rolling our way through the history of the hottest toys on wheels and the surprising stories behind their creations.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: From Furbys to Pogs, the 1990s were full of unforgettable fad toys! It was a decade where old-school toys like Beanie Babies went head-to-head with high-tech wonders like Tamagotchi.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 2
programme.desc: Facing soaring costs, mounting criticism, and a tight deadline, Walt Disney pushes the limits of technology to create the first full-length animated feature film.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 36
programme.desc: A cereal executive's bold idea to finance the "Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory" movie will kick-off a sweets revolution that produces some of the most iconic, imaginative confections in history.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Malaysia (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: In Johor, Jaime explores a Hindu Glass Temple, tests her bike on the Pasir Gudang race track and tries out a Formula car with Alex Yoong.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 3
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 113
programme.desc: After a violent melee leaves two young men brutally gunned down, Mobile detectives have to track down multiple suspects to piece together what happened.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 4
programme.desc: A young father and his family come under attack at a busy drive-thru. Terrified of his aggravated assailant, he fires his gun and allegedly injures an innocent bystander.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 528
programme.desc: A young man who came to the U.S. to fulfil his dreams is killed at a birthday party, and Tulsa police must cut through a web of lies to find the culprit.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 4
programme.desc: When jewellery seller Minerva Cantu, 26, is found bound, gagged and lifeless in her home, police suspect robbery as the motive.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: A young woman that aspires to be an FBI agent is brought in after trying to run her boyfriend over with her car, while a male exotic dancer finds himself back in jail due to a previous DUI charge.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 3
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 147
programme.desc: A convicted felon shows the judge his gunshot wounds; a judge can't stop laughing at a defendant's inability to parallel park; a convicted killer must face a judge known as 'Scary Mary'; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 148
programme.desc: A convicted felon drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a grieving mother brings her son's ashes to his killer's sentencing; and more.

programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: When Toni meets Harold at a medical convention, they click and soon marry. But when money starts going missing from Toni's account, suspicion falls on Harold.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 1
programme.desc: An undercover NYPD officer and an ATF special agent learn firsthand not to trust a suspect's demeanour, regardless of how amicable it may appear.

programme.desc: People in charming Hope Mills, are on edge when a high school freshman vanishes while on her way to meet a friend. When she turns up dead three weeks later, the community rallies to flush out the killer.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: A man risks his life to save his wife during a home invasion; two convenience store workers defend their workplace; a hairdresser is put in an unpredictable situation; and more.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbours confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent who attacks her bus with a hammer.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 4
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 2
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.desc: After the gruesome murder of an aspiring actor in Georgia, police quickly run out of leads. But a new digital forensic tool breathes new life into the investigation.

programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Five years after she was groomed and abducted by the most popular teacher in school, Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal, with famed kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 6
programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence - EP 7
programme.desc: Police quickly identify a suspect in the murder of a local college professor, but a bombshell piece of technology stolen from the crime scene then points them in a completely different direction.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: When an entire family is found in a decaying pile of bodies by the side of a Florida road, the hunt is on to find what police fear might be two more victims, Adam Matos and his four-year-old autistic son.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 1
programme.desc: A man is killed instantly after a head-on collision with a young mother driving home from a late-night shift at a Florida hotel. The Prosecution allege she was under the influence and caused the crash.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Police reopen the cold case murder of a young Marine who was killed in a hotel room and charge the woman who was with him at the time. Is she the mastermind behind his death or an innocent victim?

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: We explore the secrets of the superfactories producing hi-tech, hi speed sailing equipment, tiny treats in collectible dispensers, a national dish and five-star carpets.

programme.title: Extreme Treks (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: With its pristine forests, alpine meadows and rugged mountains, Glacier National Park in Montana is a world like no other. Ryan Pyle dons his snow-boots and embarks on an epic trek across this snowy and isolated landscape with its formidable peaks.

programme.title: Deep Dive Korea: Song Ji-Hyo's Haenyeo Adventure (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Korean star Song Ji-hyo will undertake the greatest challenge of her life: free diving with the legendary haenyeo female underwater sea fishers, who she feels a special connection to.

programme.title: The Last Overland (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Meet 87 year old Tim Slessor, the British adventurer plotting his last great adventure: recreating his epic 1955 expedition - 'First Overland: London to Singapore' - which a young David Attenborough commissioned for the BBC.

programme.desc: On an epic railway journey from Lucknow in Uttar Pradesh to Kolkata in West Bengal, Michael Portillo uses his Bradshaw's 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel, published when the British Raj was fifty-five years old, to chart a course through India's history from the days of The East India Company to the dawn of independence.

programme.title: The Pacific (2026) - EP 1

programme.title: Movin' To The Country S1 - EP 5

programme.title: 7.30 (2026) - EP 45

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 45

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Built for Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions’ uncovers the blueprints behind the world’s biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's "Tech Download" podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 3

programme.title: Posthuman S1 - EP 4

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and "accepted wisdom" to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, the Agenda quite simply sets the agenda. You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world. Broadcast from CGTN’s production center in the Kenyan capital, Nairobi, Talk Africa looks at Africa and the world from an African perspective.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. programme.title: Special Drama "A Novelist's Diary" (R)
programme.desc: The bestselling mystery novelist Serizawa Kan (Itao Itsuji) has died. Eto Megumi (Kaho), who had long hoped to become his editor, learns from his wife, Serizawa Mariko (Sylvia Grab), that he left behind a diary. To her surprise, it contains warm, intimate entries unlike anything in his writing - passages secretly added by Mariko, revealing her hidden feelings for her late husband. Desperate in her faltering career, Megumi makes Mariko a proposal that crosses the line of editorial ethics.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Yoshioka Sarasa revives ancient plant-based colors in Kyoto. As natural dyes grow scarce, she preserves their legacy while creating layered works that reveal new dimensions of nature's hues.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Silence
programme.desc: The Supreme Court ruled Japan's defunct Eugenic Protection Law as unconstitutional in July 2024 - we look into why many of the victims who were forcefully sterilised remain silent on their suffering.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: A Samurai in Time
programme.desc: A novice filmmaker bet everything on a period drama-and won 7 Japan Academy Awards! "A Samurai in Time" is an against-all-odds story of passion, grit, and samurai spirit.

programme.title: Framing Everyday Moments
programme.desc: A unique time-lapse photography project. Shot by pros and non-pros from around the world, on the transience of nature, celestial phenomena, cityscapes and each single moment of everyday life.

programme.desc: The seaside town of Hakodate has long flourished as a port - one savvy cat waits by a fisherman hoping he'll share his catch! We also meet more local cats at a fish market and a historic graveyard.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #13 I want to see the snow. / To say what you want to do, replace the 'masu' ending of a verb with 'tai desu'. For example, 'mimasu' (to see) becomes 'mitai desu' (to want to see).

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #13 I want to see the snow. / To say what you want to do, replace the 'masu' ending of a verb with 'tai desu'. For example, 'mimasu' (to see) becomes 'mitai desu' (to want to see).

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 2
programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 16
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2172
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. Joining the Special Duties Unit, he and his team, fight to uncover and thwart a plot against Hong Kong’s financial system.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 9
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 844
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Best Thing - EP 20
programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.

programme.title: The Best Thing - EP 21
programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.

programme.title: No Return - EP 3
programme.desc: Shap-chat agrees to Kwai-sim’s request for him to work at the bank. He also promises to write a report. But after completing the report, Kwai-sim’s subordinates Fong Yee and her chums reduce Shap-chat to nothing. Shap-chat reasons with Kwai-sim. Kwai-sim hastily promises to teach Fong Yee and her chums a lesson.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 10
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 845
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 10
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 5
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues. Tsz-long’s two younger sisters Chan Tsz-yan (Venus Wong) and Chan Tsz-ting (Kayan Yau) are polar opposites. Photographer Tsz-yan keeps indulging in artist Ki Ka-hei’s (Brian Tse) decadent paradise. Well-behaved and diligent college goddess Tsz-ting adopts a realistic approach when she finds her first love.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 6
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 7
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 19
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers._x000D__x000D_Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 1
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 2
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 11
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 6
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues. Tsz-long’s two younger sisters Chan Tsz-yan (Venus Wong) and Chan Tsz-ting (Kayan Yau) are polar opposites. Photographer Tsz-yan keeps indulging in artist Ki Ka-hei’s (Brian Tse) decadent paradise. Well-behaved and diligent college goddess Tsz-ting adopts a realistic approach when she finds her first love.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 16
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 9
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.

This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place.
